variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17335 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17335 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17335 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 55.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 43.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 183.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 50 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17335
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CF 50 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17335
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.
specifications: Style: Secondary Element, Dimension A: 55.0 mm, Dimension B: 43.0 mm, Dimension D: 48.0 mm, Dimension H: 183.0 mm
